privileged_info_summary: The task operates on Nuxeo 10.10 (LTS 2019), a real Document Management System that supports REST API document operations and tagging via the nxtag:tags property. Four synthetic documents are created: three containing 'Legacy Policy' in their titles (located in Projects, Templates, and DeepStorage workspaces) and one with 'Active Policy' title. The target tag is 'to_archive', a valid Nuxeo tag name. Documents are created via setup_task.sh at paths /default-domain/workspaces/Projects/Legacy-Policy-2020 (title: 'Legacy Policy 2020 - HR'), /default-domain/workspaces/Templates/Legacy-Policy-Template (title: 'Legacy Policy Template v1'), /default-domain/workspaces/DeepStorage/Legacy-Policy-Draft (title: 'Legacy Policy Draft (Scanned)'), and /default-domain/workspaces/Projects/Active-Policy-2024 (title: 'Active Policy 2024 - Remote Work'). Verification checks that the first three documents receive the 'to_archive' tag while the fourth does not.
